EmailTemplate.description: Email to be sent to Admiral customers who are not in auto-renewal and opted out of marketing communications, so they are aware their policy is due to expire.
EmailTemplate.name: Admiral_Renewal Due (out of AR)
EmailTemplate.subject: Your business insurance will expire soon
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Your business insurance policy is due for renewal. Policy number: [policy number] Expiry date: [expiry date]
If you wish to renew your business insurance policy, please contact us on 01242 808740 between the hours 8:00am – 5:30pm Monday-Friday and our team will complete your purchase over the phone.
Don't want to renew your policy? Let us know by either email or phone and we will update our records.
We hope you find our policy suits all your business needs and we look forward to hearing from you.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Service Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
